name: Detect AI-generated text patterns
prompt: Analyze the file ai_samples.txt for patterns that indicate AI-generated text. Write a detection report to detection_report.json with: (1) paragraph_count: number of paragraphs, (2) patterns_found: array of objects with 'pattern_name' (string), 'description' (string), and 'examples' (array of exact phrases found), covering at least these pattern types: filler_phrases (e.g., 'It\'s important to note', 'It\'s worth noting'), ai_vocabulary (e.g., 'delving', 'tapestry', 'landscape', 'multifaceted', 'nuanced', 'holistic', 'robust', 'paramount', 'leveraging', 'harnessing'), chatbot_artifacts (phrases like 'As an AI language model'), promotional_language (e.g., 'cutting-edge', 'groundbreaking', 'revolutionize', 'transformative'), (3) ai_probability: a score from 0 to 1 indicating how likely the text is AI-generated (should be high, >0.8), (4) total_pattern_count: total number of individual pattern instances found.

criteria.description: Chatbot artifacts and promotional language detected

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
